title: Creamy Corn Filled Japanese Arepas Mason Jar Jjigae
description: A garlicky, molten Japanese dish featuring corn arepa filled with mozzarella cheese, score-fat, low-glycemic-friendly, form=ehomaki, vessel=mason-jar.
instructions: Prepare the corn arepas according to package instructions.
In a pan, cook the ground pork over medium-high heat until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the scallions, Korean chili flakes, garlic, soy sauce, sesame oil, salt, and black pepper to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
Stuff each corn arepa with a quarter cup of shredded mozzarella cheese and place them in the mason jars.
Pour the cooked pork mixture over the cheese in each jar.
Transfer the jars to a baking sheet and bake for 15 minutes.
Remove the jars from the oven and top each with a spoonful of the remaining pork mixture.
Return the jars to the oven and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the jars from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes before serving.

axes.primaryIngredient: corn arepa filled with mozarella cheese
